nodes.title: Display Vouchers List
nodes.description: When /biz/:bizId/vouchers page loads, fetch GET /api/businesses/:bizId/vouchers and display vouchers in a table with columns: number, date, type, amount, description, status. Supports filtering by type (receipt/payment/transfer) and date range.

nodes.title: Open Voucher Form
nodes.description: When user clicks 'إضافة سند' button, display form with fields: type dropdown (receipt/payment/transfer), date picker, amount input, description textarea, fromAccountId dropdown, toAccountId dropdown, currencyId dropdown, operationTypeId dropdown (required). Operation type selection auto-fills default accounts.

nodes.title: Validate Voucher Form
nodes.description: When user attempts to submit voucher form, validates: operationTypeId is selected (shows 'يجب اختيار نوع العملية' error if missing), amount > 0, date is valid, fromAccountId and toAccountId are selected. Prevents submission if validation fails.

nodes.title: Submit Voucher
nodes.description: When user clicks 'حفظ' after validation passes, triggers POST /api/businesses/:bizId/vouchers with form data including operationTypeId. UI shows loading spinner. Success: closes form, shows success toast with voucher number, refreshes list. Failure: shows error message from API.

nodes.title: Delete Voucher
nodes.description: When user clicks delete icon on voucher row, shows confirmation dialog. On confirm, triggers DELETE /api/businesses/:bizId/vouchers/:id. Success: removes from list, shows toast. API reverses all balance changes automatically.

nodes.title: Reverse Voucher
nodes.description: When user clicks 'عكس' button on voucher row, shows confirmation dialog. On confirm, triggers POST /api/businesses/:bizId/vouchers/:id/reverse. Success: shows new reversal voucher number, marks original as reversed, refreshes list.
